jd_text: 🚀 We’re Hiring: Systems Development Director We are looking for a highly experienced Digital Platforms & Systems Director to lead the design, development, and transformation of large-scale, customer-facing and core IT systems. This is a strategic leadership role for someone who can drive digital transformation, system integration, and product innovation while managing high-performing technical teams. 🔹 Key Responsibilities: Lead the development of customer-facing platforms and digital products using agile methodologies Drive modernization of core IT systems and enterprise architecture Oversee system integrations across internal and external platforms Leverage data analytics and user insights to enhance system performance and customer experience Collaborate with cross-functional teams (CX, Operations, Marketing, etc.) Lead and develop teams across QA, Product Development, and Data Analytics 🔹 Requirements: Minimum 15+ years of experience in system development and integration At least 5 years in a leadership role Strong expertise in agile, enterprise architecture, and digital transformation Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science / IT (Master’s preferred) Arabic language skills are mandatory 💡 This is an opportunity to play a key role in shaping next-generation digital platforms within a high-impact environment.
